description: Klook is a travel booking platform for attractions, tours, transport, connectivity products, and accommodations. It helps travelers discover and book in-destination services across many destinations, especially in Asia-Pacific.
summary: Klook exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.klook.com/v2/aiappsbff/public/openai/apps-mcp-server`; no public REST/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found on klook.com beyond partner/affiliate marketing pages mentioning private integrations.
